resetWarning: This will delete all passkeys, clear the password, and generate a new one-time password. The user will need to set up their account again. Existing vaults and their encrypted content will not be affected.
emailDisabledInDev: Email sending is disabled in dev
eventsAppearAfterLogin: Events will appear here after users log in.
noEventsMatchFilters: No events match the current filters
failedLoginAlertsDesc: Receive an email digest when failed login attempts are detected on your account.
vaultBackupEmailsDesc: Receive your encrypted vault file by email for safekeeping.
auditCategoriesDesc: Enable or disable logging for each category. Changes take effect immediately.
auditEventsAppearHere: Events will appear here as they are recorded.
noEventsMatchCurrentFilters: No events match the current filters
createFirstUser: Create the first user to get started.
noUsersMatchFilters: No users match the current filters
deleteUserDescription: This will permanently delete {{username}} and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
lockUserDescription: {{username}} will be locked and will no longer be able to log in. You can unlock them at any time.
unlockUserDescription: {{username}} will be restored to active status and will be able to log in again.
expireUserReadOnly: will be set to expired status. They will be able to log in and read their vault but cannot make changes.
lifetimeUserNoExpiration: This is a lifetime user — no planned expiration date.
resetLoginDescription: This will delete all passkeys, clear the password, and generate a new one-time password for {{username}}. The user will need to set up their account again. Existing vaults and their encrypted content will not be affected.
userHasVaults: {{username}} has {{count}} vaults. Choose one to download.
reactivateDescription: Reactivate {{username}} and set a new expiration date.
otpShareMessage: Share this one-time password with the user. It will not be shown again.
adminCreateWarning: This will create a full administrator account with access to all admin features.
downgradeWarning: Downgrading from Administrator will revoke all admin privileges. This user will no longer be able to access the admin panel or manage other users.
deleteVaultConfirmText: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone and all items in the vault will be permanently lost.
